PreToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */prisma/schema.prisma|*.env*|*/src/generated/*) echo 'BLOCKED: Protected file — prisma/schema.prisma, .env*, and src/generated/ cannot be edited without explicit user request.' && exit 1;; esac

Stop.command: npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run test -- --run
